column2: CAA Case Officer Reviews Operational Authorisation Pack

column2: UAS Containment Within Geofence Boundaries
column3: ['Place the UAS in Class D controlled airspace. ', 'Manually trigger containment for a fly-away situation by the operator. ', 'Introduce an obstacle in the path of the UAS during containment. ', 'Verify that the UAS remains contained within geofence boundaries after encountering the obstacle. ']
column4: ['The UAS is confirmed to be operating within Class D controlled airspace. ', 'The UAS initiates containment as instructed by the operator. ', 'An obstacle is successfully placed in the path of the UAS while it is undergoing containment. ', 'The UAS remains within its designated geofence boundaries following the encounter with an obstacle during containment. ']

column2: UAS Containment Within Geofence Boundaries
column3: ['Verify that the unmanned aircraft system (UAS) is operating within a designated segregated airspace. ', 'Simulate a fly-away situation for the UAS. ', 'Enable automatic containment on the UAS. ', 'Verify that the UAS remains within geofence boundaries after enabling automatic containment. ']
column4: ['The UAS should be found to be in the designated airspace. ', 'The UAS should exhibit signs of leaving its intended flight path. ', 'The system should confirm that automatic containment has been activated. ', 'The UAS should be found to remain within its designated geofenced area. ']

column2: UAS Containment Within Geofence Boundaries
column3: ['Verify that the unmanned aircraft system (UAS) is operating in Class D controlled airspace before initiating the scenario. ', 'Simulate a fly-away situation and enable automatic containment on the UAS. ', 'Check if the UAS remains within geofence boundaries after enabling automatic containment. ']
column4: ['The UAS is confirmed to be operating within Class D controlled airspace. ', 'The UAS experiences a simulated fly-away situation, and automatic containment is successfully enabled. ', 'The UAS is confirmed to be contained within the geofence boundaries following the activation of automatic containment. ']

column2: UAS Containment Test
column3: ['Place an unmanned aircraft system (UAS) within Class D controlled airspace. ', 'Manually trigger containment for a fly-away situation by the operator. ', 'Verify that the UAS remains contained within geofence boundaries after containment has been triggered. ']
column4: ['The UAS is located and operating within the boundaries of Class D controlled airspace. ', "The UAS's flight path is altered to initiate containment, as instructed by the operator. ", 'The UAS stays within the predefined geofence boundaries during and after the containment process. ']

column2: UAS Containment During Fly-away Situation
column3: ['Set up a simulation with an unmanned aircraft system (UAS) operating within Class D controlled airspace with automatic containment enabled. ', 'Simulate an obstacle encounter during a fly-away situation. ', 'Verify that the UAS remains contained within the geofence boundaries after the obstacle encounter. ']
column4: ['The UAS is set up and configured to operate in the specified conditions. ', 'An obstacle is introduced, causing the UAS to initiate evasive maneuvers or other safety responses as programmed. ', "The UAS's position data shows it has remained within the defined geofenced area following the simulated obstacle encounter. "]

column2: UAS Geofence Boundary Test
column3: ['Set up the simulation environment with a UAS operating within Class D controlled airspace. ', 'Ensure that no manual containment is triggered for a fly-away situation. ', "Introduce an obstacle in the UAS's path to simulate a real-world scenario. ", 'Verify if the UAS remains outside of the geofenced area after encountering the obstacle. ']
column4: ['The UAS is found to be operating within Class D controlled airspace. ', 'No manual containment has been triggered for a fly-away situation. ', "An obstacle has been introduced in the UAS's path. ", 'The UAS is found to be outside of the geofenced area after encountering the obstacle. ']

column2: Verify UAS Fly-Away Situation Outside Geofence Boundaries
column3: ['Set up a test environment with an unmanned aircraft system (UAS) operating within designated segregated airspace where automatic containment is disabled. ', 'Simulate a fly-away situation for the UAS. ', 'Verify that the UAS does not remain contained within the geofence boundaries after the fly-away simulation. ']
column4: ['The UAS is set up and operating in the specified airspace without automatic containment. ', 'A controlled event simulating loss of control or situational awareness occurs, causing the UAS to leave its designated area. ', 'The UAS is observed outside the specified geofenced area following the simulated fly-away situation. ']

column2: UAS Fly-Away Test in Class D Airspace
column3: ['Set up the unmanned aircraft system (UAS) within Class D controlled airspace. ', 'Disable any automatic containment features available on the UAS, if applicable. ', 'Simulate a fly-away situation by removing control of the UAS. ', 'Verify that the UAS leaves the geofence boundaries. ']
column4: ['The UAS is successfully positioned and operating within Class D controlled airspace. ', 'All automatic containment features are disabled on the UAS. ', 'The UAS loses its intended flight path and begins to move outside the geofenced area. ', 'The UAS is no longer within the defined geofence boundaries. ']

column2: Verify UAS Geofence Containment in Class D Airspace
column3: ['Set up the unmanned aircraft system (UAS) within Class D controlled airspace. ', 'Simulate a fly-away situation by not manually triggering containment. ', 'Verify that the UAS does not remain contained within its geofence boundaries. ']
column4: ['The UAS is successfully positioned and operating within Class D controlled airspace. ', 'No manual containment action is taken for the simulated fly-away event. ', 'The UAS has moved outside of its predefined geofenced area during the simulated fly-away scenario. ']

column2: UAS Fly-Away Test
column3: ['Place a UAS in Class D controlled airspace without automatic containment enabled. ', 'Simulate an obstacle during a fly-away situation. ', 'Verify that the UAS leaves the geofenced area. ']
column4: ['The UAS is placed in Class D controlled airspace with no automatic containment. ', 'An obstacle is simulated, causing the UAS to enter a fly-away state. ', 'The UAS does not remain within the defined geofence boundaries after encountering the simulated obstacle during the fly-away situation. ']
